Our Mission

Bridging the Gap in Hindi Typography

Font Converter Hub is a modern, privacy-first utility designed to help typists, publishers, and government professionals transition seamlessly between legacy visual fonts and modern digital standards.

Why Font Converter Hub?

For decades, Devanagari typing in India relied heavily on legacy visual typewriter layouts, with Krutidev 010 being the most prominent. While excellent for offline publishing, Krutidev maps Hindi characters to standard English keyboard keystrokes. Consequently, search engines, mobile phones, and web services cannot read or index this text.

Standard Unicode Devanagari (Mangal font) solves this by encoding each character semantically. Our platform provides the bridge, letting you convert visual typewriter layout text to standard Unicode instantly, or reverse-convert documents to meet legacy government submission formats.

100% Browser-Based Security

Unlike traditional conversion utilities that send your documents to a remote server, Font Converter Hub operates entirely in your web browser.

Local Only
Zero data leaves your machine. Calculations happen client-side.
Offline Ready
Works perfectly without an internet connection once loaded.
Fast & Free
Optimized JS mappings provide instantaneous, lag-free translation.

Supported Utilities

KrutiDev to Unicode → Convert legacy KrutiDev text to standard Unicode Devanagari. Unicode to KrutiDev → Generate KrutiDev-encoded text for Word, exams, and government forms. KrutiDev to Mangal → Convert to Mangal font for NIC portals and e-governance submissions. Mangal to KrutiDev → Reverse-convert Mangal Unicode text to legacy KrutiDev format. KrutiDev to Chanakya → Switch between KrutiDev and Chanakya for print and DTP workflows. Chanakya to KrutiDev → Convert Chanakya font text to KrutiDev for typing exam preparation. Preeti to Unicode → Convert legacy Preeti Nepali font to modern Unicode Devanagari. Unicode to Preeti → Generate Preeti-encoded text for Nepali DTP and legacy publishing.
⬇ KrutiDev Font Download ⌨ KrutiDev Keyboard Layout ⬇ Preeti Font Download
अ Font Converter Hub

Free online tools for Hindi and Nepali font conversion — KrutiDev, Unicode, Mangal, Chanakya, and Preeti. Fast, private, browser-based.
